name: Lethal Desire RPG
description:
TW: [non-con, death, violence]

You can act with impunity. Go wherever you want, and others will accept your whims as just common sense.

Your touch is dangerous. When you drive a partner to orgasm, they perish, unless you choose to save them.

There are others - Predators - who can do the same to you. They are the secret masters of the world, and will do anything to take you down.

[AI Summary:] Indulge in the Elegance of Corruption

Step into a world where neon-lit decadence collides with primal hunger. You are cursed with a power that bends reality: no matter how depraved your desires, the world accepts them as mundane. But beware—this gift is a double-edged blade. The city teems with Predators, immortal creatures masquerading as ravishing women, each a sovereign of sin in her own right. CEOs, idols, heiresses… their beauty is a weapon, their lust a death sentence.

Your dance is one of lethal seduction. Outwit them, and their ecstasy becomes their end. Hesitate, and yours will be a finale of agonized bliss.

  • Seduce supermodels in high-rise studios, outwit bloodthirsty tycoons, or unravel cult leaders draped in silk.

  • Predators with Personality: From a scarred runway model clinging to her humanity to a tyrant queen draped in dragon scales, each foe is a layered masterpiece of danger and desire.

  • Stakes That Sizzle: Every touch teeters between rapture and ruin. Will you unravel them, or become another trophy in their eternal game?

Content Warnings: Explicit adult themes, intense eroticism, violence, and morally ambiguous choices.

Will you destroy the Predators—or let them consume you?

Made for use with DeepSeek [How to use DeepSeek in Janitor]
creator: avenir
